title: DropParty
description: A Simple Drop Party Plugin for Hosting Drop Parties in Chat & Inventories!
body:
![DropParty](https://i.imgur.com/IY2eUJx.png) ## Sneak Peeks (Lite Version) ![](https://i.imgur.com/PXM05MI.gif) ![](https://i.imgur.com/F5cwEcc.gif) ## Sneak Peeks ([Premium Version](https://github.com/tjtanjin/DropPartyFiesta/wiki)) ![](https://i.imgur.com/cKWixuu.gif) ![](https://i.imgur.com/jvaZh1y.gif) ![](https://i.imgur.com/IrC84Zd.gif) **Have questions? Visit the wiki or get help on discord:** [![](https://i.imgur.com/dYXX5sg.png)](https://github.com/tjtanjin/DropParty/wiki) [![](https://i.imgur.com/ZIMj2rG.png)](https://discord.gg/X8VSdZvBQY)
### What is DropParty? **DropParty** is a simple plugin for adding a touch of fun to your server in the form of drop parties. This is the lite version of [**DropPartyFiesta**]([https://github.com/tjtanjin/DropPartyFiesta/wiki](https://github.com/tjtanjin/DropPartyFiesta/wiki)), and thus contains a subset of the premium features. With the lite version, you can access the following features: 2 creative ways to host drop parties Throw drop party in chat (players click on a message for items, available only on 1.12+) Throw drop party into inventories (items drop into online player inventories) 14 configurable options Clone drop parties with a command to save time In-game GUI editor for easy setup Fully customizable GUI Fully customizable messages (with options for your own language files!) For a summary of the differences between the lite and premium ([**DropPartyFiesta**](https://github.com/tjtanjin/DropPartyFiesta/wiki)) version, please refer to the table below: ![](https://i.imgur.com/eqbs2Ck.png)
### You can find tutorials for the setup as well as more information on the wiki page below!
[![](https://i.imgur.com/dYXX5sg.png)](https://github.com/tjtanjin/PlayerHide/wiki) ### Like my work? Check out my other plugins below!
